info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Green proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Green API

post.description: Batch Invocation of Images The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=ImageBatchModeration and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
The detection services supported by Image Moderation Pro. Separate multiple services with commas. Valid values:

- baselineCheck: General baseline check

- baselineCheck\_pro: General baseline check (Professional Edition)

- tonalityImprove: Content administration check

- aigcCheck: AIGC image check
parameters.name: Service

schema.description:
The detection services supported by Image Moderation Pro. Separate multiple services with commas. Valid values:

- baselineCheck: General baseline check

- baselineCheck\_pro: General baseline check (Professional Edition)

- tonalityImprove: Content administration check

- aigcCheck: AIGC image check

parameters.description: The parameters for the content to moderate.
parameters.name: ServiceParameters

schema.description: The parameters for the content to moderate.

Code.description: The return code. A value of 200 indicates success.

Data.description: The results of the image content moderation.

DataId.description: The data ID of the moderated object.

ManualTaskId.description: The ID of the manual review task.

Result.description: An array of results for the image moderation. The results contain parameters such as threat labels and confidence scores.

Confidence.description: The confidence score. The value ranges from 0 to 100, with two decimal places. Some labels do not have a confidence score.

Label.description: The label returned after the image content moderation. An image may have multiple labels and scores.

Results.description: The detailed moderation results for each detection service. This is an array.

Ext.description: Additional reference information for the image.

CustomImage.description: A list of hits in custom image libraries.

ImageId.description: The ID of the hit custom image.

LibId.description: The ID of the custom library.

LibName.description: The name of the hit custom image library.

Location.description: The location of the recognized object.

H.description: The height of the logo area, in pixels.

W.description: The width of the logo area, in pixels.

X.description: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the area, in pixels. The origin (0,0) is the upper-left corner of the image.

Y.description: The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the area, in pixels. The origin (0,0) is the upper-left corner of the image.

Confidence.description: The confidence score. The value ranges from 0 to 100, with two decimal places.

FigureId.description: The ID of the recognized public figure.

FigureName.description: The name of the recognized public figure.

Location.description: The location of the recognized object.

H.description: The height of the area, in pixels.

W.description: The width of the area, in pixels.

X.description: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the area, in pixels. The origin (0,0) is the upper-left corner of the image.

Y.description: The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the area, in pixels. The origin (0,0) is the upper-left corner of the image.

TextInImage.description: The text detected in the image.

CustomText.description: If a custom text library is hit, the ID and name of the library, and the hit keywords are returned.

KeyWords.description: The custom keywords. Separate multiple keywords with a comma.

LibId.description: The ID of the custom library.

LibName.description: The name of the custom library.

OcrResult.description: The information for each line of text recognized in the image.

Location.description: The coordinates of the text line.

H.description: The height of the text area, in pixels.

W.description: The width of the text area, in pixels.

X.description: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the text area, in pixels. The origin (0,0) is the upper-left corner of the image.

Y.description: The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the text area, in pixels. The origin (0,0) is the upper-left corner of the image.

Result.description: The results of the image detection, including threat labels and confidence scores. This is an array.

Confidence.description: The confidence score. The value ranges from 0 to 100, with two decimal places. Some labels do not have a confidence score.

Label.description: The label returned after the image content moderation. An image may have multiple labels and scores.

Service.description: The detection service supported by Image Moderation Pro.

RequestId.description: The unique ID of the request. Alibaba Cloud generates this ID for each request. Use this ID to troubleshoot issues.

post.description: Image moderation The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=ImageModeration and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Service.description:
The detection types supported by the enhanced image moderation feature. Valid values:

- baselineCheck: general baseline check

- baselineCheck\_pro: general baseline check (Professional Edition)

- baselineCheck\_cb: general baseline check (outside China)

- tonalityImprove: content administration check

- aigcCheck: AIGC image check

- aigcViolationDetection: AIGC image infringement detection

- aigcDetector: determines whether an image is generated by AIGC

- profilePhotoCheck: profile picture check

- postImageCheck: image check for posts and comments

- advertisingCheck: marketing material check

- liveStreamCheck: video/livestream screenshot check

- generalOcr: general image and text OCR

- generalRecognition: image object recognition

- postImageCheckByVL: image moderation service with large and small models

- postImageCheckByVL\_cb: image moderation service with large and small models (outside China)

- baselineCheckByVL: general image moderation service with a large model

ServiceParameters.description:
The parameters for the content to detect. The value is a JSON string.

- imageUrl: The URL of the object to detect. This parameter is required.

- dataId: The data ID of the object to detect. This parameter is optional.

- referer: The referer request header. This parameter is used for scenarios such as hotlink protection and is optional.

schema.description: The value returned in the body.

Code.description: The return code. A value of 200 indicates that the request was successful.

Data.description: The results of the image content moderation.

AccountId.description: The AccountId specified in the request.

DataId.description:
The data ID of the detected object.

> If you specify the dataId parameter in the request, the corresponding dataId is returned.

Ext.description: Auxiliary reference information for the image.

AigcData.description: The detection information for the implicit AIGC identity in the image.

AIGC.description: The detection information for the implicit AIGC identity.

ContentProducer.description: The code or name of the service provider, which identifies the content producer.

ContentPropagator.description: The name, ID, or code of the propagation platform. For services that provide AI-generated content, this can be the same as the value of ContentProducer.

Label.description:
Indicates whether the content is generated by artificial intelligence (AI). Valid values:

- 1: The content is generated by AI.

- 2: (For distribution platforms only) The content may be generated by AI.

- 3: (For distribution platforms only) The content is suspected to be generated by AI.

ProduceID.description: The content production ID. This is a unique ID used on the production platform to trace the source of synthesized content.

PropagateID.description: The content propagation ID. This is a unique ID that the propagation platform assigns to the distributed synthetic content.

ReservedCode1.description:
A reserved field.

This field can store information that the generative service provider uses for security protection to ensure the integrity of content and identities. A hashing mechanism based on ContentProducer and ProduceID can be used to securely store and verify key information.

ReservedCode2.description:
A reserved field.

This field can be used by content distribution service providers for security protection to ensure the integrity of content and identities. A hashing mechanism based on ContentProducer and ProduceID can be used to securely store and verify key information.

CustomImage.description: A list of hits from the custom image library.

ImageId.description: The ID of the hit custom image.

LibId.description: The ID of the hit custom image library.

LibName.description: The name of the hit custom image library.

Confidence.description: The confidence level of the bangs detection. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher value indicates a more reliable result.

Value.description:
The detection result for bangs. Valid values:

- Has: The person has bangs.

- None: The person does not have bangs.

Confidence.description: The confidence level of the gender detection. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher value indicates a more reliable result.

Value.description:
The detected gender. Valid values:

- Male: male

- FeMale: female

Glasses.description:
Indicates whether the person is wearing glasses. Valid values:

- None: The person is not wearing glasses.

- Common: The person is wearing regular glasses.

- Sunglass: The person is wearing sunglasses.

Confidence.description: The confidence level of the hairstyle detection. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher value indicates a more reliable result.

Value.description:
The detected hairstyle. Valid values:

- Bald: bald

- Long: long hair

- Short: short hair

Confidence.description: The confidence level of the hat detection. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher value indicates a more reliable result.

Value.description:
Indicates whether a hat is detected. Valid values:

- Wear: A hat is worn.

- None: No hat is worn.

H.description: The height of the face area. Unit: pixel.

W.description: The width of the face area. Unit: pixel.

X.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the face area to the y-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Y.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the face area to the x-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Confidence.description: The confidence level of the mask detection. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher value indicates a more reliable result.

Value.description:
Indicates whether a mask is worn. Valid values:

- Wear: A mask is worn.

- None: No mask is worn.

Confidence.description: The confidence level of the mustache detection. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher value indicates a more reliable result.

Value.description:
Indicates whether a mustache is present. Valid values:

- Has: A mustache is present.

- None: No mustache is present.

Quality.description: The quality of the face image.

Blur.description:
The blurriness of the face image. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher score indicates a blurrier image.

A value from 0 to 25 is recommended.

Integrity.description:
The integrity of the face. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher score indicates a more complete face.

A value from 80 to 100 is recommended.

Pitch.description:
The pitch angle of the face.

A value from -30 to 30 is recommended.

Roll.description:
The roll angle of the face.

A value from -30 to 30 is recommended.

Yaw.description:
The yaw angle of the face.

A value from -30 to 30 is recommended.

Smile.description: The degree of the smile. The value ranges from 0 to 100. A higher score indicates a wider smile.

H.description: The height of the detected area. Unit: pixel.

W.description: The width of the detected area. Unit: pixel.

X.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the detected area to the y-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Y.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the detected area to the x-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Confidence.description: The confidence score. The value ranges from 0 to 100, with two decimal places retained.

OcrResult.description: The results of optical character recognition (OCR).

Location.description: The coordinates of the text line.

H.description: The height of the text area. Unit: pixel.

W.description: The width of the text area. Unit: pixel.

X.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the text area to the y-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Y.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the text area to the x-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Text.description: A single line of recognized text.

FigureId.description: The ID of the detected public figure.

FigureName.description: The name of the detected public figure.

H.description: The height of the detected area. Unit: pixel.

W.description: The width of the detected area. Unit: pixel.

X.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the detected area to the y-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Y.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the detected area to the x-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Recognition.description: The results of image object recognition.

Classification.description: The category of the recognized object in the image.

Confidence.description: The confidence level. The value ranges from 0 to 100, with two decimal places retained. No confidence level is returned when the value is nonLabel.

TextInImage.description: The text information that is hit in the image.

CustomText.description: If a custom text library is hit, the custom library ID, custom library name, and custom word are returned.

KeyWords.description: The custom words. Separate multiple words with commas.

LibName.description: The name of the custom library.

OcrResult.description: Each line of text recognized in the image.

Location.description: The coordinates of the text line.

H.description: The height of the text area. Unit: pixel.

W.description: The width of the text area. Unit: pixel.

X.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the text area to the y-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

Y.description: The distance from the upper-left corner of the text area to the x-axis. The origin is the upper-left corner of the image. Unit: pixel.

ManualTaskId.description: The ID of the manual review task.

Result.description: The results of the image moderation, including the threat labels and confidence levels. The value is an array.

Confidence.description: The confidence level. The value ranges from 0 to 100, with two decimal places retained. Some labels do not have a confidence level.

Label.description: The label returned after the image content is moderated. Multiple labels and scores may be returned for a single image.

Msg.description: The message returned for the request.

RequestId.description: The ID of the request. Alibaba Cloud generates a unique ID for each request. You can use the ID to troubleshoot issues.

post.description: This is the synchronous detection API for the multi-modal agent. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=MultiModalAgent and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

AppID.description: The unique identifier of the whiteboard application. To get the whiteboard application ID, see [CreateApp](~~204234~~).

ServiceParameters.description: The set of parameters for the auditing service. This includes the taskId of the detection task to query. You can specify only one taskId at a time.

Code.description: The return code. A value of 200 indicates that the request was successful.

Data.description: The result of the image content detection.

Result.description: The structure of the label item.

Reason.description:
A description of the result when the session is terminated.

- **SESSION\_KILLED**: The session was successfully terminated.

- **SESSION\_EXPIRED**: The session has expired.

- **SESSION\_NO\_PERMISSION**: The account used to terminate the session does not have sufficient permissions.

- **SESSION\_ACCOUNT\_ERROR**: The account or password used to terminate the session is incorrect.

- **SESSION\_IGNORED\_USER**: The session of an account that does not need to be terminated.

- **SESSION\_INTERNAL\_USER\_OR\_COMMAND**: The session or command of an Alibaba Cloud operations account.

- **SESSION\_KILL\_TASK\_TIMEOUT**: A timeout occurred when terminating the session.

- **SESSION\_OTHER\_ERROR**: Other errors.

RiskLevel.description:
The risk level. The value is returned based on the configured high and low risk scores. Valid values:

- high: High risk

- medium: Medium risk

- low: Low risk

- none: No risk detected

post.description: API for synchronous detection The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=MultiModalGuard and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Service.description:
The type of the moderation service. Valid values:

- query\_security\_check: AI input content moderation.

- response\_security\_check: AI-generated content moderation.

ServiceParameters.description: The set of parameters required for the moderation service. The value must be a JSON string.

DataId.description: The data ID of the detection object.

Confidence.description: The confidence score. Valid values: 0 to 100. The value is accurate to two decimal places.

Ext.description: The extended information about the detection results.

Suggestion.description: The moderation suggestion. Valid values: -**block**: The content is non-compliant. -**pass**: The content is compliant.
The moderation suggestion. Valid values: -block: The content is non-compliant. -pass: The content is compliant.

post.description: This service uses dynamic policies and models to defend against adversarial content. It provides moderation services for various business scenarios and detects different types of violations. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=TextModeration and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Service.description: The type of moderation service. Valid values:

ServiceParameters.description: The parameters for the moderation service. The value must be a JSON string.

dataId.description:
The data ID of the moderated object.

> If you specify the dataId parameter in the request, its value is returned in this parameter.

ext.description: Auxiliary reference information for the text.

llmContent.description: The output from the Large Language Model (LLM).

outputText.example: 正常。文本中无风险内容。

labels.description: The moderation labels. If multiple labels are returned, they are separated by commas (,). Valid values: ad: advertisement profanity: profanity contraband: contraband sexual\_content: sexual content violence: violent and terrorist content nonsense: meaningless content spam: spam negative\_content: undesirable content cyberbullying: cyberbullying C\_customized: A match in a custom library

manualTaskId.description: The ID of the manual review task.

reason.description:
A JSON string that contains the reason for the moderation result. The string includes the following fields:

1. riskTips: The sub-labels.

2. riskWords: The detected risk words.

3. adNums: The detected ad-related numbers.

4. customizedWords: The detected custom words.

5. customizedLibs: The names of the custom libraries that contain a match.

6. riskLevel: The risk level, which is recommended by the system. Valid values:

- high: high risk

- medium: medium risk

- low: low risk

Message.description: The response message for the request.

post.description: Text Moderation Plus is an upgraded service that moderates the input instructions and generated text of large language models (LLMs). This service can retrieve standard answers for specific input instructions and lets you enable or disable moderation labels. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=TextModerationPlus and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

Service.description: The type of the moderation service.

ServiceParameters.description: The set of parameters required for the moderation service. The value must be a JSON string.

Code.description: The return code. A value of 200 indicates that the request was successful.

items.description: The details of a suggested action.

HitLibName.description: The name of the keyword library that was hit.

items.description: The details of a prompt attack detection result.

DataId.description:
The ID of the data that was moderated.

> If you specify the \`dataId\` parameter in the request, the value of this parameter is returned.

OutputText.example: 正常。文本中无风险内容。

ManualTaskId.description: The ID of the manual review task.

Confidence.description: The confidence score. The value ranges from 0 to 100. The value is accurate to two decimal places.

CustomizedHit.description: The custom keywords that were hit.

items.description: The details of a custom keyword that was hit.

KeyWords.description: The keywords that were hit, separated by commas.

LibName.description: The name of the keyword library.

RiskPositions.description: The position information of the risk words.

items.description: The position information of the risk words.

EndPos.description: The end position of the non-compliant word.

StartPos.description: The start position of the non-compliant word.

RiskWords.description: The risk keywords that were hit.

items.description: The details of a sensitive data detection result.

Message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
